notes: Works flawlessly, appart from crashes that also happen on Windows, this is reduced by moving the game to an SSD
title: Company of Heroes: Blitzkrieg Mod

notes: Works awesomely, but you need to add the following launch command to the Game to start in blitzkrieg mod : -dev -mod blitzkrieg -nomovies  (Don't add them to the blitzkrieg mod, but to the game)
title: Company of Heroes: Blitzkrieg Mod

notes:
Had many issues getting the blitzkrieg mod to run, after that the game would crash the second i would finish loading. Got all of it to work and run perfectly with the launch options of PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command% -dev -mod blitzkrieg -nomovies 
Keep in mind these launch options are on the base game itself! Not the mod!
One minor issue i did encounter was if i played a match and went into a second one without restarting the game i would get tons of texture corruption. After a restart it was pefectly fine. Also dont minimize, just dont.
title: Company of Heroes: Blitzkrieg Mod
